mainEntity.name: Can I sue my employer for a slip and fall at work in West Valley City Utah?
mainEntity.text: Can I sue my employer for a slip and fall at work in West Valley City Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: No in West Valley City Utah workers' comp is the exclusive remedy against employers for slip and fall injuries barring gross negligence or intentional acts. Claims go through state insurance not lawsuits.[7]

suggestedAnswer.text: Utah's workers' comp act bars most lawsuits against employers for on-job slips providing no-fault benefits instead. Exceptions rare like intentional harm or employer intoxication. Third parties like equipment makers may be suable separately. Insurance firms aggressively defend so attorney guidance prevents pitfalls in proving exceptions.[7]

name: Can You Sue Employer for Workplace Slip in West Valley City
description: No in West Valley City Utah workers' comp is the exclusive remedy against employers for slip and fall injuries barring gross negligence or intentional acts. Cla
